characters.appearance: Male, 20s-30s, medium build, fair complexion. He has curly dark hair and wears dark-rimmed glasses. His features are stylized and animated.
Male, 40s-50s, stocky build, olive complexion. He has short dark hair with some graying and a stubble beard.
characters.wardrobe: A rust-orange t-shirt and white wireless earbuds.
characters.demeanor: Eager to learn, slightly hesitant but willing to try.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Ready to practice speaking English? Nobody is judging you here, so make all the mistakes you want!
Character B says: Yes. I am passed out in 2022.
Character A says: No, no, we say: I graduated. 'Passed out' means to faint. I analyze your level and personalize your plan.
Character B says: I graduated in 2022.
Character A says: Perfect! Now, what is your biggest goal?
Character B says: I am wanting to clear a job interview.
Character A says: Careful: 'I want to clear'. You don't type, you just speak, and I explain the logic in your language.
Character B says: I want to clear a job interview.
Character A says: Much better! You learned your mother tongue by speaking, English is exactly the same.
Character B says: Wow, I am feeling confident.
Character A says: See? ChatGPT just gives you answers, but Supernova actually makes you speak.
Character B says: You make me speak.
Character A says: Exactly! Your English is already improving.
Character B says: Thanks! Wait, who are you?
Character A says: I am Miss Nova, your AI teacher on Supernova. Practice just 15 minutes a day, and build your confidence.
Character B says: Okay, downloading Supernova now.
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes privacy and no-judgement immediately to lower viewer anxiety.
- Uses a relatable Indian-English error ('passed out') for the live correction hook.
- Weaves in personalization, mother-tongue reframe, and ChatGPT contrast naturally into the back-and-forth.
- Preserves the in-story reveal device to introduce Miss Nova and the 15-minute time anchor.
